nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information about an existing and accessible GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_PUBLIC_KEY
nodes.name: Get a repository public key
nodes.description: Gets a repository's public key for encrypting secrets to be used in GitHub Actions, if the repository exists and is accessible.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_README
nodes.name: Get a repository readme
nodes.description: Fetches the README file (if it exists and is accessible) from a specified GitHub repository, returning its Base64-encoded content and metadata.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_README_FOR_A_DIRECTORY
nodes.name: Get a repository readme for a directory
nodes.description: Retrieves the README file from a specified directory within a GitHub repository, optionally at a given commit, branch, or tag.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_RULESET
nodes.name: Get a repository ruleset
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific repository ruleset by its ID; if `includes_parents` is true, the search for this `ruleset_id` also extends to rulesets from parent organizations.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_RULE_SUITE
nodes.name: Get a repository rule suite
nodes.description: Gets detailed information for a specific repository rule suite by its ID, including its evaluation status and the results of its individual rules.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_SECRET
nodes.name: Get a repository secret
nodes.description: Gets metadata (name, creation/update timestamps) for an existing repository secret, excluding its encrypted value.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_SUBSCRIPTION
nodes.name: Get a repository subscription
nodes.description: Gets the authenticated user's subscription details for a repository, indicating if they receive notifications.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_VARIABLE
nodes.name: Get a repository variable
nodes.description: Gets a specific GitHub Actions variable by name from an accessible repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REPOSITORY_WEBHOOK
nodes.name: Get a repository webhook
nodes.description: Returns the configuration of an existing webhook for a given repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REVIEW_COMMENT_FOR_A_PULL_REQUEST
nodes.name: Get a review comment for a pull request
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific pull request review comment by its ID, provided the repository exists, is accessible, and the comment ID is valid.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_REVIEW_FOR_A_PULL_REQUEST
nodes.name: Get a review for a pull request
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific review for a pull request using its owner, repository, pull request number, and review ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_SECRET_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: Get a secret for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Retrieves metadata (name, timestamps, visibility; not the value) for a specific, existing development environment secret associated with the authenticated user's GitHub Codespaces.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_SELF_HOSTED_RUNNER_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get a self hosted runner for an organization
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific self-hosted runner registered within a GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_SELF_HOSTED_RUNNER_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get a self hosted runner for a repository
nodes.description: Gets a specific self-hosted runner for a repository by its unique ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ASSIGNMENT_GRADES
nodes.name: Get assignment grades
nodes.description: Retrieves all grades for an existing GitHub Classroom assignment.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_TAG
nodes.name: Get a tag
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific Git tag object from a GitHub repository, using the SHA of the tag object itself.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_TEAM_BY_NAME
nodes.name: Get a team by name
nodes.description: Retrieves a GitHub team by its slug from a specific organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_THREAD
nodes.name: Get a thread
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific GitHub notification thread using its unique `thread_id`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_THREAD_SUBSCRIPTION_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: Get a thread subscription for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's subscription details for a specific notification thread, identified by `thread_id`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_TREE
nodes.name: List repository files and directories
nodes.description: Browse and list all files/directories in a GitHub repository. Efficiently retrieves the complete repository structure in a single API call when used with recursive mode. Perfect for analyzing codebase structure, finding specific files, or getting an overview of repository contents without cloning.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_USER
nodes.name: Get a user
nodes.description: Retrieves the public profile information for an existing GitHub user, specified by their username.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WEBHOOK_CONFIGURATION_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get a webhook configuration for an organization
nodes.description: Retrieves the configuration for a specific webhook associated with a GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WEBHOOK_CONFIGURATION_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get a webhook configuration for a repository
nodes.description: Returns the configuration for an existing webhook on the specified repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION_WEBHOOK
nodes.name: Get a webhook delivery for an organization webhook
nodes.description: Returns detailed information for a specific delivery attempt of a webhook configured for the specified GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WORKFLOW
nodes.name: Get a workflow
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific GitHub Actions workflow in a repository, identified by either its numeric ID or its filename.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WORKFLOW_RUN
nodes.name: Get a workflow run
nodes.description: Gets a specific workflow run by its ID from a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_A_WORKFLOW_RUN_ATTEMPT
nodes.name: Get a workflow run attempt
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific attempt of a workflow run in a GitHub repository, including its status, conclusion, and timings.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_BILLING_USAGE_REPORT_USER
nodes.name: Get billing usage report for user
nodes.description: Retrieves the billing usage report for a specified GitHub user. Use when you need to analyze billing costs and usage patterns.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_BRANCH_PROTECTION
nodes.name: Get branch protection
nodes.description: Retrieves branch protection settings for a specific, existing, and accessible branch in a GitHub repository; protection feature availability varies by GitHub product plan.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CATALOG_MODELS
nodes.name: Get catalog models
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve the list of AI models available in the GitHub Models catalog. Use when you need to discover available models, their capabilities, token limits, and supported modalities.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CHECK_RUN
nodes.name: Get a check run
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific check run within a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CHECK_SUITE
nodes.name: Get a check suite
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific check suite (a collection of check runs) by its ID from a repository accessible to the authenticated user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CLASSROOM
nodes.name: Get a classroom
nodes.description: Retrieves details for a specific GitHub Classroom. Requires the authenticated user to be an administrator of the classroom.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODE_OF_CONDUCT
nodes.name: Get a code of conduct
nodes.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific GitHub code of conduct using its unique key.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODE_OF_CONDUCT_GRAPH_QL
nodes.name: Get Code of Conduct (GraphQL)
nodes.description: Tool to look up a code of conduct by its key using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need to fetch code of conduct details as part of a GraphQL workflow.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODEQL_DATABASE
nodes.name: Get a CodeQL database for a repository
nodes.description: Gets an existing CodeQL database (including a download URL) for a specified language in an accessible repository, if one has been successfully built for that language.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODE_SCANNING_ALERT
nodes.name: Get a code scanning alert
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific code scanning alert, which identifies potential code vulnerabilities or errors, by its number from the specified GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODE_SCANNING_ANALYSIS
nodes.name: Get a code scanning analysis for a repository
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific code scanning analysis on an accessible repository, identified by its `analysis_id`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODE_SCANNING_DEFAULT_SETUP
nodes.name: Get a code scanning default setup configuration
nodes.description: Gets the default setup configuration for code scanning in a repository, including state, languages, query suite, and schedule for a repository if it exists.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CODESPACE
nodes.name: Get a codespace for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Call to retrieve detailed information for a `codespace_name` belonging to the authenticated user, ensuring the codespace exists and is accessible.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMIT_AUTHORS
nodes.name: Get commit authors
nodes.description: Fetches commit authors identified during a repository import, used to map authors from an external VCS to GitHub accounts. NOTE: This endpoint has been deprecated by GitHub as of April 12, 2024, and is no longer available. The Source Imports REST API has been retired due to very low usage levels. Please use the GitHub Importer tool at https://github.com/new/import for repository imports.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMIT_COMMENT
nodes.name: Get a commit comment
nodes.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific commit comment in a GitHub repository, using its unique identifier.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMIT_OBJECT
nodes.name: Get a commit object
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information (including author, committer, message, tree, parents, verification) for a specific commit in a GitHub repository, identified by its SHA.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMIT_SIGNATURE_PROTECTION
nodes.name: Get commit signature protection
nodes.description: Gets the commit signature protection status for a branch in a repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMIT_STATUSES
nodes.name: Get commit statuses
nodes.description: List all statuses for a commit reference (SHA, branch, or tag) in reverse chronological order. Use when you need to check CI/CD status results from various systems for a specific commit.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_COMMUNITY_PROFILE_METRICS
nodes.name: Get community profile metrics
nodes.description: Retrieves a repository's community profile metrics, including health percentage and the presence of key community files (e.g., README, LICENSE).

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CONTEXTUAL_INFORMATION_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: Get contextual information for a user
nodes.description: Gets contextual hovercard information for a GitHub user; `subject_type` and `subject_id` can be jointly provided for more specific details.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_PROTECTION_RULE
nodes.name: Get a custom deployment protection rule
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific custom deployment protection rule (used by GitHub Apps for external validation or manual approval of deployments) for a given environment in a repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEFAULT_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_A_CODESPACE
nodes.name: Get default attributes for a codespace
nodes.description: Get pre-flight data (e.g., default location, devcontainer path) for creating a Codespace in a given repository (must exist and be accessible), optionally for a specific Git ref.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_PERMISSIONS_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get default workflow permissions for an organization
nodes.description: Gets the default GITHUB_TOKEN workflow permissions and settings for a GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_PERMISSIONS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get default workflow permissions for a repository
nodes.description: Gets the default workflow permissions (`read` or `write`) for the GITHUB_TOKEN and whether it can approve pull request reviews in an existing and accessible repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEPENDENCY_DIFF
nodes.name: Get a diff of the dependencies between commits
nodes.description: Gets the dependency diff between two Git revisions in a repository, where 'basehead' specifies the revisions and 'name' can optionally scope to a specific manifest file.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEPLOY_KEY
nodes.name: Get a deploy key
nodes.description: Gets a specific deploy key, identified by its `key_id`, for the GitHub repository specified by `owner` and `repo`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEPLOYMENT
nodes.name: Get a deployment
nodes.description: Gets a specific deployment by ID from a repository, provided the repository and deployment ID exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEPLOYMENT_BRANCH_POLICY
nodes.name: Get a deployment branch policy
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific deployment branch policy for an environment in a repository, identified by its unique ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DEPLOYMENT_STATUS
nodes.name: Get a deployment status
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific deployment status by its ID for a given deployment within a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DETAILS_ABOUT_A_CODESPACE_EXPORT
nodes.name: Get details about a codespace export
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific export of a codespace.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DISCUSSION
nodes.name: Get a discussion
nodes.description: Fetches a specific discussion by its number from a team within an organization. This is a read-only action that retrieves discussion details including title, body, author information, comment count, and reactions. The authenticated user must be a member of the organization to access team discussions.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_DISCUSSION_COMMENT
nodes.name: Get a discussion comment
nodes.description: Fetches a specific comment from a team discussion within a specific organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_EMOJIS
nodes.name: Get emojis
nodes.description: Lists all emojis available for use on GitHub, including custom and Unicode emojis.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ENTERPRISE_MEMBER_INVITATION
nodes.name: Get Enterprise Member Invitation
nodes.description: Tool to look up a pending enterprise unaffiliated member invitation by invitee and enterprise. Use when you need to check the status of a specific invitation.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_FEEDS
nodes.name: Get feeds
nodes.description: Fetches a list of available GitHub feed URLs for the authenticated user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GIST
nodes.name: Get a gist
nodes.description: Fetches a specific GitHub gist by its `gist_id`, returning comprehensive details if the gist exists.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GIST_COMMENT
nodes.name: Get a gist comment
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific Gist comment by its ID and the Gist's ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GIST_REVISION
nodes.name: Get a gist revision
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific revision of a gist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_ACTIONS_CACHE_USAGE_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get GitHub Actions cache usage for an organization
nodes.description: Retrieves total GitHub Actions cache usage statistics for an organization, including active cache count and size across all repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_ACTIONS_CACHE_USAGE_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get github actions cache usage for a repository
nodes.description: Retrieves the total count of active GitHub Actions caches and their combined size in bytes for a specified repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_ACTIONS_PERMISSIONS_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get github actions permissions for an organization
nodes.description: Gets the GitHub Actions permissions for a specified organization, detailing repository enablement and allowed actions policies.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_ACTIONS_PERMISSIONS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get GitHub Actions permissions for a repository
nodes.description: Gets the GitHub Actions permissions policy for a repository, including its enabled status and the scope of allowed actions.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_BILLING_PREMIUM_REQUEST_USAGE_REPORT_USER
nodes.name: Get billing premium request usage
nodes.description: Tool to get billing premium request usage report for a GitHub user. Use when you need to retrieve usage data for premium features like Copilot or AI models.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_BILLING_USAGE_SUMMARY_FOR_USER
nodes.name: Get billing usage summary for user
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve billing usage summary for a GitHub user account. Use when tracking usage costs, monitoring billing details, or generating usage reports for a specific user. Note: This endpoint only returns data for the past 24 months and is currently in public preview.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_META_INFORMATION
nodes.name: Get github meta information
nodes.description: Fetches GitHub's publicly available metadata, useful for configuring network security policies or IP allow-listing.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITHUB_PAGES_BUILD
nodes.name: Get github pages build
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific GitHub Pages build for a repository, which must have GitHub Pages enabled.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GITIGNORE_TEMPLATE
nodes.name: Get a gitignore template
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific .gitignore template from GitHub by its name, which must be an existing template in GitHub's collection.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GLOBAL_SECURITY_ADVISORY
nodes.name: Get a global security advisory
nodes.description: Retrieve a global GitHub security advisory by its GHSA identifier. Use this to get detailed information about vulnerabilities including severity, affected packages, CVSS scores, and references.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GRAPHQL_NODE
nodes.name: Fetch GraphQL Node
nodes.description: Tool to fetch any GitHub object by its global node ID. Use when you have a node_id and need to retrieve the corresponding object details.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_GRAPHQL_RATE_LIMIT
nodes.name: Get GraphQL rate limit
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve the authenticated client's GitHub GraphQL API rate limit information. Use when you need to check remaining quota, current usage, or reset time for GraphQL requests.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_INFORMATION_ABOUT_A_SARIF_UPLOAD
nodes.name: Get information about a sarif upload
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information, including processing status and results URL, about a specific SARIF (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) upload for a repository, uniquely identified by its sarif_id.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_INTERACTION_RESTRICTIONS_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get interaction restrictions for an organization
nodes.description: Retrieves interaction restrictions for an organization, showing which GitHub user types can interact with its public repositories and when restrictions expire; returns an empty response if no restrictions are set.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_INTERACTION_RESTRICTIONS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get interaction restrictions for a repository
nodes.description: Retrieves active interaction restrictions for a repository, detailing which user groups are limited from activities like commenting or creating pull requests, and when these restrictions expire.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_INTERACTION_RESTRICTIONS_FOR_PUBLIC_REPOS
nodes.name: Get interaction restrictions for public repositories
nodes.description: Retrieves currently active interaction restrictions for the authenticated user's public repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_LABEL
nodes.name: Get a label
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific label by its name from a specified GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_LARGE_FILES
nodes.name: Get large files
nodes.description: Lists files larger than 100MB identified during a previous source import for the specified repository. NOTE: This endpoint has been deprecated by GitHub as of April 12, 2024, and is no longer available. The Source Imports REST API has been retired due to very low usage levels. Please use the GitHub Importer tool at https://github.com/new/import for repository imports.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_LATEST_PAGES_BUILD
nodes.name: Get latest pages build
nodes.description: Retrieves information about the most recent GitHub Pages build for a repository, which must exist, be accessible, have GitHub Pages enabled, and have at least one prior build.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_LICENSE
nodes.name: Get a license
nodes.description: Call this action to retrieve comprehensive details for a specific software license recognized by GitHub, using its unique license key.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_LICENSE_GRAPH_QL
nodes.name: Get License (GraphQL)
nodes.description: Tool to look up an open source license by its SPDX ID using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need to fetch license details for compliance tracking or repository setup.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_OCTOCAT
nodes.name: Get octocat
nodes.description: Fetches an ASCII art representation of GitHub's Octocat, suitable for text-based displays.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_OIDC_SUBJECT_CLAIM_TEMPLATE
nodes.name: Customize OIDC subject claim template
nodes.description: Retrieves the OpenID Connect (OIDC) subject claim customization template for a repository, which defines the `sub` claim structure in OIDC tokens for GitHub Actions workflows; returns the default configuration if no customization is applied.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORG_ALLOWED_ACTIONS
nodes.name: Get allowed actions and workflows for an org
nodes.description: Gets the list of allowed actions and reusable workflows for an organization when the 'allowed_actions' policy is set to 'selected'.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORGANIZATION_AUDIT_LOG
nodes.name: Get organization audit log
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve an organization's audit log events for security and compliance investigations. Use when tracking organizational changes, security audits, or compliance monitoring. Requires organization owner permissions and read:audit_log scope.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORGANIZATION_CUSTOM_PROPERTY
nodes.name: Get a custom property for an organization
nodes.description: Retrieves the definition (schema) of a specific, existing custom property for an organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORGANIZATION_PROJECT_ITEM
nodes.name: Get organization project item
nodes.description: Tool to get an item from an organization-owned GitHub Projects V2 project. Use when you need to retrieve details about a specific project item including its content, fields, timestamps, and creator information.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORGANIZATION_PUBLIC_KEY
nodes.name: Get organization public key for Codespaces secrets
nodes.description: Retrieves an organization's public key, which must be used to encrypt secret values before they are configured for Codespaces.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORGANIZATION_PUBLIC_KEY_FOR_DEPENDABOT
nodes.name: Fetch Public Key For Secret Encryption
nodes.description: Retrieves the public key for an existing GitHub organization, required for encrypting Dependabot secrets. Requires admin:org scope.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORG_DEV_ENVIRONMENT_SECRET_SAFELY
nodes.name: Get org dev environment secret safely
nodes.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific secret available to an organization's GitHub Codespaces without exposing its encrypted value.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_ORG_OIDC_SUBJECT_CLAIM_TEMPLATE
nodes.name: Get custom OIDC subject claim template
nodes.description: Retrieves the OpenID Connect (OIDC) subject claim customization template for a GitHub organization, which defines how the `sub` claim in OIDC tokens for workflows is constructed.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PAGES_DNS_HEALTH_CHECK
nodes.name: Get a dns health check for github pages
nodes.description: Retrieves the DNS health check status (e.g., CNAME/A records, HTTPS) for a GitHub Pages site; the check may be pending (HTTP 202) on initial calls or after site changes.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PAGES_SITE
nodes.name: Get a GitHub Pages site
nodes.description: Retrieves information for a GitHub Pages site, which must be enabled for the repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PAGE_VIEWS
nodes.name: Get page views
nodes.description: Retrieves page view statistics for a repository over the last 14 days, including total views, unique visitors, and a daily or weekly breakdown.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PENDING_DEPLOYMENTS_FOR_A_WORKFLOW_RUN
nodes.name: Get pending deployments for a workflow run
nodes.description: Retrieves pending deployment environments for a specific workflow run that are awaiting approval due to protection rules.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PROJECT_PERMISSION_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: Get project permission for a user
nodes.description: Retrieves permission information for a GitHub project (classic) collaborator. Returns the permission level and full user object for a collaborator on a GitHub project (classic). The permission returned can be admin, write, read, or none.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PUBLIC_KEY_FOR_SECRET_ENCRYPTION
nodes.name: Get public key for secret encryption
nodes.description: Retrieves a repository's public key for encrypting GitHub Codespaces secrets; requires `repo` scope or equivalent read access to codespaces secrets for private repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PUBLIC_KEY_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: Get public key for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's public key for encrypting GitHub Codespaces secrets. The returned key must be used with libsodium sealed box encryption before creating or updating secrets via the API.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW_PROTECTION
nodes.name: Get pull request review protection
nodes.description: Retrieves the pull request review protection settings for a specific branch in a GitHub repository, if such protection is configured.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_RATE_LIMIT_STATUS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: Get rate limit status for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's current GitHub API rate limit status, including usage and limits across different resource categories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_RAW_REPOSITORY_CONTENT
nodes.name: Get Raw Repository Content
nodes.description: Tool to fetch raw file content from a GitHub repository. Returns raw bytes in whatever format the file uses (JSON, CSV, binary, etc.) — parsing and validation are the caller's responsibility. Ensure owner, repo, ref, and path are consistent when combining with other GitHub tools to avoid mismatched-ref errors.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPO_ALLOWED_ACTIONS
nodes.name: Get allowed actions and workflows for a repository
nodes.description: Gets the settings for allowed actions and reusable workflows in a repository. Requires the repository's `allowed_actions` policy to be set to `selected` (returns 409 if set to `all` or `local_only`).

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPO_DEV_ENV_SECRET
nodes.name: Get repository development environment secret
nodes.description: Gets metadata (name, creation/update timestamps) for a specific, existing development environment secret (Codespaces secret) in a repository, without exposing its value.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOS_ATTESTATIONS
nodes.name: Get repository attestations
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve attestations by subject digest from a GitHub repository. Use when you need to verify or check attestations for a specific artifact identified by its SHA256 digest.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_CLONES
nodes.name: Get repository clones
nodes.description: Retrieves the total number of clones and a breakdown of clone activity (daily or weekly) for a specified repository over the preceding 14 days.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_CONTENT
nodes.name: Get repository content
nodes.description: Retrieves a file's Base64 encoded content or lists a directory's contents from a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_GRAPH_QL
nodes.name: Get Repository via GraphQL
nodes.description: Tool to lookup a repository by owner and name using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need comprehensive repository information.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_OWNER
nodes.name: Get Repository Owner
nodes.description: Tool to lookup a repository owner (User or Organization) by login using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need to determine whether a login is a user or organization and retrieve basic profile information.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_PERMISSIONS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: Get repository permissions for a user
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific user's permission level ('admin', 'write', 'read', or 'none') for a given repository, where 'maintain' role is reported as 'write' and 'triage' as 'read'.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_PUBLIC_KEY_FOR_ENCRYPTION
nodes.name: Retrieve repo public key for encryption
nodes.description: Gets a repository's public key, used to encrypt secrets for Dependabot.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_SECRET_SECURELY
nodes.name: Get repository secret securely
nodes.description: Retrieves metadata for an existing Dependabot secret in a repository, without exposing its encrypted value.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_SECURITY_ADVISORY
nodes.name: Get repository security advisory
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve a repository security advisory using its GHSA identifier. Use when you need detailed information about a specific security vulnerability.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_WEBHOOK_DELIVERY
nodes.name: Get a delivery for a repository webhook
nodes.description: Retrieves a specific delivery for a repository webhook, identified by its `hook_id` and `delivery_id`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_RULES_FOR_A_BRANCH
nodes.name: Get rules for a branch
nodes.description: Retrieves all active rules for a specific branch in a GitHub repository, excluding rules in 'evaluate' or 'disabled' status.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_SINGLE_ORG_SECRET_WITHOUT_DECRYPTION
nodes.name: Get Organization Dependabot Secret
nodes.description: Gets a single organization Dependabot secret's metadata (name, timestamps, visibility) without revealing its encrypted value. Requires admin:org scope.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_STATUS_CHECKS_PROTECTION
nodes.name: Get status checks protection
nodes.description: Retrieves the status check protection settings for a specific branch in a GitHub repository, if status check protection is enabled for it.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_TEAM_MEMBERSHIP_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: Get team membership for a user
nodes.description: Retrieves a user's role and membership status within a specific team in an organization. Returns membership details including role ('member' or 'maintainer') and state ('active' or 'pending'). If the user is not a member of the team, returns is_member=False with a descriptive message. Requires the authenticated user to be an organization member with visibility into the team.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_TEAMS_WITH_ACCESS_TO_THE_PROTECTED_BRANCH
nodes.name: Get teams with access to the protected branch
nodes.description: Lists teams with explicit push access to a protected branch, provided team restrictions are configured in the branch's protection settings; returns an empty list otherwise.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: Get the authenticated user
nodes.description: Gets the profile information for the currently authenticated GitHub user, including potentially private details based on user settings.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_COMBINED_STATUS_FOR_A_SPECIFIC_REFERENCE
nodes.name: Get the combined status for a specific reference
nodes.description: Retrieves the aggregated commit status (e.g., success, failure, pending) from all checks for a specific reference (SHA, branch, or tag) in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_HOURLY_COMMIT_COUNT_FOR_EACH_DAY
nodes.name: Get the hourly commit count for each day
nodes.description: Retrieves the 'punch card' data, showing hourly commit counts for each day of the week for an existing and accessible repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_LAST_YEAR_OF_COMMIT_ACTIVITY
nodes.name: Get the last year of commit activity
nodes.description: Fetches weekly commit totals and daily commit counts for the last 52 weeks for a specified GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_LATEST_RELEASE
nodes.name: Get the latest release
nodes.description: Fetches the latest official (non-prerelease, non-draft) release for a GitHub repository; requires at least one such published release.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_LICENSE_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get the license for a repository
nodes.description: Retrieves the license file and its details for a repository, optionally from a specific Git reference (branch, tag, or commit SHA).

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_REVIEW_HISTORY_FOR_A_WORKFLOW_RUN
nodes.name: Get the review history for a workflow run
nodes.description: Retrieves the detailed approval history for a specific workflow run in a GitHub repository, detailing each review's environment, state, reviewer, and comments, to track the approval process for workflows, particularly automated deployments.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_STATUS_OF_A_GITHUB_PAGES_DEPLOYMENT
nodes.name: Get the status of a GitHub Pages deployment
nodes.description: Retrieves the status of a specific GitHub Pages deployment for a repository, which must have GitHub Pages enabled.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_WEEKLY_COMMIT_ACTIVITY
nodes.name: Get the weekly commit activity
nodes.description: Fetches the weekly commit activity (additions and deletions per week) for a repository over the past year; best for repositories with under 10,000 commits.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_WEEKLY_COMMIT_COUNT
nodes.name: Get the weekly commit count
nodes.description: Retrieves the weekly commit count for a repository, detailing commits by the owner and all contributors over the last 52 weeks; GitHub may return a 202 status or an empty response if statistics are being computed.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_THE_ZEN_OF_GITHUB
nodes.name: Get the Zen of GitHub
nodes.description: Retrieves a random quote from GitHub's 'Zen of GitHub' collection, reflecting GitHub's design philosophies and offering humorous insights, useful for displaying GitHub wisdom or a lighthearted message.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_TOP_REFERRAL_PATHS
nodes.name: Get top referral paths
nodes.description: Fetches the top 10 most viewed content paths for a repository from the last 14 days.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_TOP_REFERRAL_SOURCES
nodes.name: Get top referral sources
nodes.description: Fetches the top 10 websites that referred traffic to a repository within the last 14 days.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_USER_BY_ID
nodes.name: Get user by ID
nodes.description: Retrieves a GitHub user's profile information by their unique numeric account ID. Use when you know the user's numeric ID rather than their username.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_USER_PROJECT_ITEM
nodes.name: Get user project item
nodes.description: Tool to get an item from a user-owned project in GitHub Projects V2. Use when you need to retrieve details about a specific item (issue, pull request, or draft issue) in a user's project board.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_USERS_ATTESTATIONS
nodes.name: Get user attestations by subject digest
nodes.description: Tool to get attestations by subject digest for a GitHub user. Use when you need to retrieve attestation data for a specific artifact or resource identified by its subject digest.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_USERS_PROJECTS_V2
nodes.name: Get user's projects v2
nodes.description: Tool to list GitHub Projects v2 for a specified user. Use when you need to retrieve all projects owned by a user with pagination support.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_USERS_WITH_ACCESS_TO_THE_PROTECTED_BRANCH
nodes.name: Get users with access to the protected branch
nodes.description: Lists users with explicit push access to a protected branch, provided its protection rule restricts pushes to specific users.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_VIEWER_GRAPHQL
nodes.name: Get Viewer via GraphQL
nodes.description: Tool to retrieve the authenticated user's profile information via GitHub GraphQL. Use when working with GraphQL queries or need viewer details in GraphQL format.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_WORKFLOW_EXTERNAL_ACCESS
nodes.name: Get workflow external access level
nodes.description: Gets the access level settings for a private repository, determining how workflows outside this repository can use its actions and reusable workflows.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_WORKFLOW_RUN_JOB
nodes.name: Get a job for a workflow run
nodes.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific job within a GitHub Actions workflow run, given its `job_id` which must be valid for the specified repository's workflow.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_WORKFLOW_RUN_USAGE
nodes.name: Get workflow run usage
nodes.description: Gets the billable time, in milliseconds, for a specific workflow run, detailing time spent on various operating systems.

nodes.label: GITHUB_GET_WORKFLOW_USAGE
nodes.name: Get workflow usage
nodes.description: Gets the billable time (in milliseconds, broken down by runner OS) for a specific workflow within a repository for the current billing cycle.

nodes.label: GITHUB_IS_REPOSITORY_STARRED_BY_THE_USER
nodes.name: Check if repo starred by auth user
nodes.description: Use to determine if the authenticated user has starred a specific GitHub repository, which is confirmed by an HTTP 204 status (resulting in an empty dictionary in the response data); the action fails (e.g., HTTP 404) if the repository is not starred or does not exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ACCEPTED_ASSIGNMENTS_FOR_AN_ASSIGNMENT
nodes.name: List accepted assignments for an assignment
nodes.description: Lists accepted assignments (student repositories created after acceptance) for an existing GitHub Classroom assignment, identified by its unique `assignment_id`.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ACCESSIBLE_REPOSITORIES
nodes.name: List repositories accessible via GitHub App installation
nodes.description: Lists repositories that the authenticated user can access through a specific GitHub App installation. Returns repositories where the user has explicit :read, :write, or :admin permission through the installation. The response includes permission details for each repository. Prerequisites: - Requires a GitHub App user access token (not a standard OAuth token) - Use GITHUB_LIST_APP_INSTALLATIONS first to get valid installation IDs

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_APP_INSTALLATIONS
nodes.name: List app installations for user token
nodes.description: Lists GitHub App installations accessible to the authenticated user via their access token, including installation details, permissions, and repository access.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_APPS_WITH_ACCESS_TO_THE_PROTECTED_BRANCH
nodes.name: Get apps with access to the protected branch
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Apps with push access to a repository's protected branch.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ARTIFACTS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List artifacts for a repository
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Actions workflow artifacts for a specified repository, which must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ASSIGNEES
nodes.name: List assignees
nodes.description: Lists users who can be assigned to issues in a repository, typically those with push access.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ASSIGNMENTS_FOR_A_CLASSROOM
nodes.name: List assignments for a classroom
nodes.description: Lists all assignments for a given GitHub Classroom `classroom_id`; the classroom must exist and be accessible.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ATTESTATION_REPOSITORIES
nodes.name: List attestation repositories
nodes.description: Tool to list attestation repositories for an organization. Use when you need to discover which repositories in an organization have attestations. Attestations provide verifiable metadata about software artifacts.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_AVAILABLE_MACHINE_TYPES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List available machine types for a repository
nodes.description: Lists machine types available for GitHub Codespaces in a repository, optionally using a Git ref to check compatibility based on prebuild availability and devcontainer configurations.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_BRANCHES
nodes.name: List branches
nodes.description: Lists branches for an existing GitHub repository, with an option to filter by protection status.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_BRANCHES_FOR_HEAD_COMMIT
nodes.name: List branches for head commit
nodes.description: Lists branches in an accessible repository where the provided commit SHA is the head, useful for identifying development lines based on that commit.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CHECK_RUN_ANNOTATIONS
nodes.name: List check run annotations
nodes.description: Lists annotations for a specific check run in a GitHub repository, detailing issues like errors or warnings on particular code lines.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CHECK_RUNS_FOR_A_REF
nodes.name: List check runs for a git ref
nodes.description: List GitHub check runs for a commit SHA, branch, or tag to assess CI status and conclusions. Use when you need reliable CI pass/fail signals beyond commit metadata.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CHECK_RUNS_IN_A_CHECK_SUITE
nodes.name: List check runs in a check suite
nodes.description: Lists check runs for a specific check suite in a GitHub repository, optionally filtering by check name or status.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CHECK_SUITES_FOR_A_GIT_REFERENCE
nodes.name: List check suites for a git reference
nodes.description: Lists check suites for a Git reference (commit SHA, branch, or tag) in a repository, optionally filtering by GitHub App ID or check run name.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CHILD_TEAMS
nodes.name: List child teams
nodes.description: Lists the immediate child teams of a parent team within an organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CLASSROOMS
nodes.name: List classrooms
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Classrooms to which the authenticated user has administrative access.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODEOWNERS_ERRORS
nodes.name: List codeowners errors
nodes.description: Lists syntax errors in a repository's CODEOWNERS file, which must be located at the root, `.github/`, or `docs/` directory for the specified ref.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODEQL_DATABASES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List CodeQL databases for a repository
nodes.description: Lists all CodeQL databases for a repository where CodeQL analysis has been previously run and completed.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODE_SCANNING_ALERTS_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: List code scanning alerts for an organization
nodes.description: Lists code scanning alerts for a GitHub organization; use EITHER `tool_name` OR `tool_guid` if filtering by tool, not both.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODE_SCANNING_ALERTS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List code scanning alerts for a repository
nodes.description: Lists code scanning alerts for a repository, optionally filtering by tool (which must have produced scan results for the repository), Git reference, state, or severity.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODE_SCANNING_ANALYSES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List code scanning analyses for a repository
nodes.description: Lists code scanning analyses for an existing repository, optionally filtering by tool (name or GUID), Git reference, or SARIF ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODES_OF_CONDUCT
nodes.name: Get all codes of conduct
nodes.description: Retrieves all available codes of conduct from GitHub, often used to select one for a repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODES_OF_CONDUCT_GRAPHQL
nodes.name: List Codes of Conduct (GraphQL)
nodes.description: Tool to fetch all available codes of conduct using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need to retrieve the complete list of codes of conduct that can be applied to repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODESPACES_FOR_A_USER_IN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: List codespaces for a user in organization
nodes.description: Lists all GitHub Codespaces owned by a specified member of a given organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODESPACES_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List codespaces for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Codespaces for the authenticated user, optionally filtering by repository ID and supporting pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CODESPACES_FOR_THE_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: List codespaces for the organization
nodes.description: Lists active/pending GitHub Codespaces for an existing organization; admins list all, members list their own.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMENT_CHANGES
nodes.name: List comment changes across organization
nodes.description: Tool to list issue and PR comment changes across an organization's repositories efficiently. Use when monitoring comment activity without per-PR/per-issue polling. Filters organization events to return only comment-related events (IssueCommentEvent, PullRequestReviewCommentEvent, CommitCommentEvent). Note: Events are limited to the past 30 days and up to 300 events per timeline. Use ETag header for efficient polling to avoid rate limits.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMENTS_FOR_A_PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW
nodes.name: List comments for a pull request review
nodes.description: Lists all comments for a specific review on a GitHub pull request.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMIT_COMMENTS
nodes.name: List commit comments
nodes.description: Retrieves all comments for a specific commit in a GitHub repository, supporting pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMIT_COMMENTS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List commit comments for a repository
nodes.description: Lists all commit comments for a specified repository, which must exist and be accessible.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMITS
nodes.name: List commits
nodes.description: Lists commits for a GitHub repository. Requires 'owner' (username/org) and 'repo' (repository name) parameters. Optionally filter by SHA/branch, path, author, committer, or date range.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMITS_ON_A_PULL_REQUEST
nodes.name: List commits on a pull request
nodes.description: Lists commits for a pull request; requires the repository and pull request to exist and be accessible, and supports pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_COMMONLY_USED_LICENSES
nodes.name: Get all commonly used licenses
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of commonly used software licenses from GitHub, optionally filtering for 'featured' licenses whose specific selection criteria by GitHub may vary.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CUSTOM_PROPERTIES_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get all custom properties for an organization
nodes.description: Gets the schema definitions for all custom properties configured for an organization, not the specific values assigned to repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CUSTOM_PROPERTY_VALUES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: Get all custom property values for a repository
nodes.description: Gets all custom property values for a repository. Custom properties are defined at the organization level, so this endpoint works with organization-owned repositories. Returns an empty array if no custom properties are set.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_CUSTOM_PROPERTY_VALUES_FOR_ORG_REPOS
nodes.name: List custom property values for organization repositories
nodes.description: Lists repositories in an organization with their custom property values. Requires 'Custom properties' organization permission (read).

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DELIVERIES_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION_WEBHOOK
nodes.name: List deliveries for an organization webhook
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of webhook deliveries for a specific webhook in an organization, allowing inspection of delivery history and details.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DELIVERIES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY_WEBHOOK
nodes.name: List deliveries for a repository webhook
nodes.description: Retrieves delivery attempts for a specific repository webhook to inspect its history; ensure the webhook ID exists.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DEPLOY_KEYS
nodes.name: List deploy keys
nodes.description: Lists deploy SSH keys for a specified repository; the repository must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DEPLOYMENT_BRANCH_POLICIES
nodes.name: List deployment branch policies
nodes.description: Lists all deployment branch policies for a specified environment in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DEPLOYMENTS
nodes.name: List deployments
nodes.description: Lists deployments for a specified repository; repository must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DEPLOYMENT_STATUSES
nodes.name: List deployment statuses
nodes.description: Lists all statuses for a given deployment in a repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DISCUSSION_COMMENTS
nodes.name: List discussion comments
nodes.description: Lists all comments for a specific team discussion within an organization. Note: Team discussions are deprecated as of 2023-11-28. Consider using GitHub Discussions instead. This endpoint requires the authenticated user to be a member of the organization and have access to the team's discussions.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_DISCUSSIONS
nodes.name: List discussions
nodes.description: Lists discussions for a specific team within an organization, with options for sorting, pagination, and filtering by pinned status. Note: Team discussions are deprecated as of 2023-11-28. Consider using GitHub Discussions instead. This endpoint requires the authenticated user to be a member of the organization and have access to the team's discussions.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_EMAIL_ADDRESSES_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List email addresses for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists all email addresses for the authenticated user, including their primary status, verification status, and visibility. This action retrieves the complete list of email addresses associated with the authenticated user, providing important details such as which email is primary and whether the emails are verified.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ENVIRONMENT_CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_RULES
nodes.name: List environment custom deployment rules
nodes.description: Lists all custom deployment protection rule integrations for a repository environment; the `environment_name` must be URL-encoded.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ENVIRONMENTS
nodes.name: List environments
nodes.description: Retrieves all deployment environments for a specified repository, which are used to configure protection rules and secrets for different software lifecycle stages.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ENVIRONMENT_SECRETS
nodes.name: List environment secrets
nodes.description: Lists the names and metadata (not values) of secrets for a specified, existing environment within an existing GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES
nodes.name: List environment variables
nodes.description: Lists all environment variables, which are plaintext key-value pairs for GitHub Actions workflows, for a specified environment within a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_EVENTS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List events for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists public events for the specified GitHub user, or private events if authenticated as that user, in reverse chronological order.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_EVENTS_RECEIVED_BY_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List events received by the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists events a specific GitHub user received from followed users and watched repositories; returns private events if authenticated for `username`, otherwise public.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_FOLLOWERS_OF_A_USER
nodes.name: List followers of a user
nodes.description: Lists followers for a specified, existing GitHub user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_FOLLOWERS_OF_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List followers of the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists users following the authenticated GitHub user, returning an empty list if the user has no followers.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_FORKS
nodes.name: List forks
nodes.description: Lists forks for a specified repository, which must exist, with options for sorting and pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GIST_COMMENTS
nodes.name: List gist comments
nodes.description: Lists comments for a specified GitHub Gist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GIST_COMMITS
nodes.name: List gist commits
nodes.description: Lists all commits for a specified gist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GIST_FORKS
nodes.name: List gist forks
nodes.description: Lists all forks for a given GitHub gist ID.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GISTS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List gists for a user
nodes.description: _lists public gists for a specified GitHub user._

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GISTS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List gists for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists gists for the authenticated user, with optional filtering by update time and pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GITHUB_ACTIONS_CACHES_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List github actions caches for a repository
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Actions caches for a repository, with options to filter by Git reference or cache key, and to sort and paginate results.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GITHUB_PAGES_BUILDS
nodes.name: List GitHub Pages builds
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Pages builds for a repository; GitHub Pages must be enabled on the repository for builds to be listed.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GITIGNORE_TEMPLATES
nodes.name: Get all gitignore templates
nodes.description: Retrieves all available .gitignore template names from GitHub (e.g., 'Python', 'Node', 'Java'), used for generating .gitignore files.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GLOBAL_SECURITY_ADVISORIES
nodes.name: List global security advisories
nodes.description: Lists GitHub's global security advisories, filterable by various attributes including ID, type, ecosystem, severity, and dates.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_GPG_KEYS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List GPG keys for a user
nodes.description: Tool to list GPG keys for a GitHub user. Use when you need to fetch the public GPG keys associated with a specific GitHub user account.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_INSTALLATION_REQUESTS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_APP
nodes.name: List installation requests for the authenticated app
nodes.description: Lists pending installation requests made by users or organizations for the authenticated GitHub App.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_INSTANCES_OF_A_CODE_SCANNING_ALERT
nodes.name: List instances of a code scanning alert
nodes.description: Lists all instances of a specific code scanning alert, optionally filtered by Git ref; requires code scanning to be enabled on the repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_COMMENTS
nodes.name: List issue comments
nodes.description: Lists comments for a specified issue in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_COMMENTS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List issue comments for a repository
nodes.description: Lists issue comments, including those on pull requests, for an accessible repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_DEPENDENCIES_BLOCKED_BY
nodes.name: List issue dependencies blocked by
nodes.description: Tool to list dependencies an issue is blocked by. Use when you need to retrieve all issues that are blocking a specific issue from being closed or completed.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_DEPENDENCIES_BLOCKING
nodes.name: List issue dependencies blocking
nodes.description: Tool to list dependencies an issue is blocking. Use when you need to see which issues are blocked by a specific issue.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_EVENTS
nodes.name: List issue events
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of all events for a specific issue within a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_EVENTS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List issue events for a repository
nodes.description: Lists all issue events (e.g., closed, reopened, assigned) for a specified repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUES_ASSIGNED_TO_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List issues for user
nodes.description: Lists GitHub issues for the authenticated user across visible repositories, with filtering by user relationship, state, labels, an ISO 8601 `since` timestamp (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ), and sorting options; pull requests are typically included.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ISSUE_TYPES
nodes.name: List issue types
nodes.description: List all issue types configured for a GitHub organization. Requires read:org scope for OAuth tokens.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_JOBS_FOR_A_WORKFLOW_RUN
nodes.name: List jobs for a workflow run
nodes.description: Lists jobs for a specific workflow run in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_JOBS_FOR_A_WORKFLOW_RUN_ATTEMPT
nodes.name: List jobs for a workflow run attempt
nodes.description: Lists jobs, including details like ID, status, and steps, for a specific attempt of a GitHub Actions workflow run.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LABELS_FOR_AN_ISSUE
nodes.name: List labels for an issue
nodes.description: Lists all labels for a specified issue in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LABELS_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List labels for a repository
nodes.description: Retrieves all labels for a specified, existing GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LABELS_FOR_A_SELF_HOSTED_RUNNER_FOR_A_REPOSITORY
nodes.name: List labels for a self-hosted runner for a repository
nodes.description: Lists all labels assigned to a specific self-hosted runner registered with the given repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LABELS_FOR_ISSUES_IN_A_MILESTONE
nodes.name: List labels for issues in a milestone
nodes.description: Lists all labels for issues within a specific milestone in a repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LABELS_FOR_SELF_HOSTED_RUNNER_ORG
nodes.name: List labels for a self-hosted runner for an organization
nodes.description: Lists all labels assigned to a specific self-hosted runner within a GitHub organization, which are used to route workflows.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_LICENSES_GRAPH_QL
nodes.name: List Licenses (GraphQL)
nodes.description: Tool to fetch all known open source licenses using GitHub's GraphQL API. Use when you need to retrieve the complete list of licenses that can be applied to repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_MACHINE_TYPES_FOR_A_CODESPACE
nodes.name: List machine types for a codespace
nodes.description: Lists available machine types for a specific, accessible codespace, enabling it to be transitioned to a new hardware configuration.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_MATCHING_REFERENCES
nodes.name: List matching references
nodes.description: Lists all Git references (branches or tags) in a repository that start with the provided partial reference path (e.g., `heads/my-feature` or `tags/v1.2`).

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_MILESTONES
nodes.name: List milestones
nodes.description: Lists milestones, which track progress for groups of issues and pull requests, for an existing repository, allowing filtering by state and sorting.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_NOTIFICATIONS
nodes.name: List notifications for authenticated user
nodes.description: Tool to list notification threads for the authenticated user with efficient polling support. Use when you need to fetch the user's GitHub notification inbox with filters like unread/participating/since. Returns notification threads plus polling headers (Last-Modified, ETag, X-Poll-Interval) for efficient polling. IMPORTANT: This endpoint requires a Personal Access Token (classic) with 'notifications' or 'repo' scope. It does NOT work with GitHub App tokens or fine-grained personal access tokens. If the token type is incompatible, a clear error message will be returned.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_NOTIFICATIONS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List notifications for the authenticated user (Deprecated)
nodes.description: DEPRECATED: Use GITHUB_LIST_NOTIFICATIONS instead. Lists notifications for the authenticated user, sorted by most recent update, with filtering and pagination options.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_CODESPACES_SECRETS
nodes.name: List org level codespaces secrets
nodes.description: Lists all Codespaces secrets available for a specified organization, which must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_EVENTS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List organization events for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists public events in a specified GitHub organization for the authenticated user's organization dashboard. Returns activities like repository pushes, pull requests, issues, forks, and other public events within the organization. The authenticated user must be a member of the organization to see events.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_MEMBERS
nodes.name: List organization members
nodes.description: Lists public and concealed members of a GitHub organization; viewing concealed members requires authenticated user to be an organization member.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_MEMBERSHIPS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_U
nodes.name: List organization memberships for authenticated user
nodes.description: List organization memberships for authenticated user

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_PROJECTS
nodes.name: List organization projects
nodes.description: Lists projects (V2) for a specified GitHub organization, with optional search query and cursor-based pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_REPOSITORIES
nodes.name: List organization repositories
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of repositories for a specified GitHub organization, allowing filtering by type and sorting.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_ROLES_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: Get all organization roles for an organization
nodes.description: Lists all custom organization roles for an existing GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATIONS
nodes.name: List organizations
nodes.description: Lists GitHub organizations for the authenticated user, sorted by ID in ascending order.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_SECRETS
nodes.name: List organization secrets
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Actions secrets available for a specified organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATIONS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List organizations for a user
nodes.description: Lists public organizations for a specified GitHub user; the `username` must be a valid GitHub handle.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATIONS_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List organizations for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists organizations the authenticated GitHub user is a member of, returning details for each organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_VARIABLES
nodes.name: List organization variables
nodes.description: Lists all GitHub Actions variables for a specified organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORGANIZATION_WEBHOOKS
nodes.name: List organization webhooks
nodes.description: Lists all webhooks for a specified GitHub organization; the organization must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_FINE_GRAINED_PERMISSIONS
nodes.name: List organization fine-grained permissions
nodes.description: Lists all fine-grained permissions available in a GitHub organization for use in custom organization roles. These permissions define granular access controls that can be combined when creating custom roles. Note: This endpoint requires GitHub Enterprise Cloud with the custom organization roles feature enabled. The authenticated user must be an administrator or have the 'read_organization_custom_org_role' permission.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_ISSUES_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List organization issues assigned to the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists issues for the authenticated user within a specified GitHub organization, with options to filter by involvement type, state, labels, and to sort results.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_PACKAGE_VERSIONS
nodes.name: List package versions for an organization package
nodes.description: Lists all versions for a specified package, if it exists and is owned by the given GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_PROJECT_VIEW_ITEMS
nodes.name: List organization project view items
nodes.description: Tool to list items for an organization project view. Use when you need to retrieve all items from a specific view within a GitHub organization's Projects V2 project. Returns a list of project items with their content, metadata, and field values.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_REPOS_WITH_GITHUB_ACTIONS_ENABLED
nodes.name: List organization repositories with Github Actions enabled
nodes.description: Lists the selected repositories that are enabled for GitHub Actions in an organization. This endpoint only returns results when the organization's 'enabled_repositories' permission policy is configured to 'selected'. Requires admin:org scope and organization admin permissions.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_RESOURCE_ACCESS_TOKENS
nodes.name: List org resource access tokens
nodes.description: Lists approved fine-grained personal access tokens (PATs) with access to resources in a GitHub organization, optionally filtering by owner, repository, permissions, or last usage time. AUTHENTICATION REQUIREMENT: This endpoint requires GitHub App authentication with 'Personal access tokens' organization permissions (read). Standard personal access tokens CANNOT use this endpoint. The GitHub App must also have access to the organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_RESOURCES_WITH_PERSONAL_TOKENS
nodes.name: List org resources with personal tokens
nodes.description: Lists requests from organization members to access organization resources with fine-grained personal access tokens (pending, approved, or denied). Note: This endpoint requires GitHub App authentication with 'organization_personal_access_token_requests:read' permissions; it cannot be used with personal access tokens.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_ORG_SECRETS_WITHOUT_VALUES
nodes.name: List organization Dependabot secrets without values
nodes.description: Lists all Dependabot secrets (metadata like names, creation/update timestamps, but not their encrypted values) for a specified organization, which must exist.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_OUTSIDE_COLLABORATORS_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: List outside collaborators for an organization
nodes.description: Lists outside collaborators for a GitHub organization, with options to filter (e.g., by 2FA status) and paginate results.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_OWNED_PACKAGE_VERSIONS
nodes.name: List owned package versions
nodes.description: Lists all versions for an existing package owned by the authenticated user, identified by its type and name.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PACKAGES_FOR_AN_ORGANIZATION
nodes.name: List packages for an organization
nodes.description: Lists GitHub Packages for an organization, noting specific interpretations for package_type and visibility parameters.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PACKAGES_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List packages for a user
nodes.description: Lists packages for a specified GitHub user, filterable by package type and visibility.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PACKAGES_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List packages for the authenticated user's namespace
nodes.description: Lists packages of a specific type and visibility within the authenticated user's namespace on GitHub.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PACKAGE_VERSIONS_FOR_A_PACKAGE_OWNED_BY_A_USER
nodes.name: List package versions for a package owned by a user
nodes.description: Lists all versions of a public package owned by a specific GitHub user, identified by package type, package name, and username.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PENDING_TEAM_INVITATIONS
nodes.name: List pending team invitations
nodes.description: Lists all pending membership invitations for a specified team within an organization. The authenticated user must be an organization member with the read:org scope. The response includes invitation details such as the invitee's login/email, the role they're being invited to, and who sent the invitation. The 'role' field indicates the type of invitation: - 'direct_member': Regular organization member - 'admin': Organization administrator - 'billing_manager': Billing manager role - 'hiring_manager': Hiring manager role - 'reinstate': Reinstating a previous member Note: If the invitee is not a GitHub member, the 'login' field will be null and only the 'email' field will be populated.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_CARDS
nodes.name: List project cards (Classic - Deprecated)
nodes.description: Lists all project cards for a given column_id in GitHub Projects (classic). DEPRECATION NOTICE: GitHub Projects (classic) and its REST API were sunset on April 1, 2025. This action will return 404 for most requests on GitHub.com. However, it may still work on GitHub Enterprise Server instances where classic projects are enabled. For new projects, use GitHub Projects V2 which uses the GraphQL API instead. See: https://github.blog/changelog/2024-05-23-sunset-notice-projects-classic/ Returns a list of project cards including: id, node_id, url, note (or null for linked cards), creator info, content_url (for issue/PR cards), column_url, project_url, timestamps, and archived status.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_COLLABORATORS
nodes.name: List project collaborators (classic)
nodes.description: Lists collaborators for a GitHub Project (classic) by project ID. IMPORTANT: This action uses the Projects (classic) REST API which was sunset on April 1, 2025 for GitHub.com. The API may still be available on GitHub Enterprise Server versions before 3.17. For GitHub.com users: GitHub Projects (classic) has been replaced by the new Projects experience. The new Projects does not have a REST API for listing collaborators - use the GitHub web interface to manage project collaborators instead. You must be an organization owner or a project admin to list collaborators.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_COLUMNS
nodes.name: List project columns
nodes.description: Lists all of a GitHub project's columns (e.g., 'To Do', 'In Progress'); project_id must identify a valid, accessible project. Note: This action uses GitHub's Projects (classic) REST API. The Projects (classic) API was sunset on April 1, 2025. This action will return an empty columns list with an informative message for projects that no longer exist or when the API returns 404.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_FIELDS_FOR_USER
nodes.name: List project fields for user
nodes.description: Tool to list all fields in a GitHub Projects V2 project for a specific user. Use when you need to see available fields in a project.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_ITEMS_FOR_USER
nodes.name: List project items for user
nodes.description: Tool to list items for a user-owned GitHub project. Use when you need to retrieve all items (issues, pull requests, draft issues) from a specific project belonging to a user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PROJECT_VIEW_ITEMS_FOR_USER
nodes.name: List items for user project view
nodes.description: Tool to list items for a user's GitHub Projects (v2) view. Use when you need to retrieve items from a specific view of a user's project. Supports pagination and field filtering.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_EMAILS_FOR_AUTH_USER
nodes.name: List public email addresses for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists the public email addresses for the authenticated user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_EVENTS
nodes.name: List public events
nodes.description: Lists public GitHub events, which may be delayed by up to 5 minutes, with support for pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_EVENTS_FOR_A_NETWORK_OF_REPOSITORIES
nodes.name: List public events for a network of repositories
nodes.description: Retrieves public events (up to 90 days old, newest first) for a GitHub repository network, including the repository and its forks.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_EVENTS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List public events for a user
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of public events for a specified GitHub user, in reverse chronological order.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_EVENTS_RECEIVED_BY_A_USER
nodes.name: List public events received by a user
nodes.description: Lists public events for a specified GitHub user (e.g., activities in repositories they watch or are involved in); the target user's profile must be public, and if blocked by the authenticated user, a 404 error is returned.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_GISTS
nodes.name: List public gists
nodes.description: Lists public gists from GitHub, optionally filtering by a 'since' timestamp and supporting pagination; results are generally newest first.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_KEYS_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List public keys for a user
nodes.description: Lists the verified public SSH keys for a specified GitHub user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_ORGANIZATION_EVENTS
nodes.name: List public organization events
nodes.description: Lists public events for a specified GitHub organization, which must exist. This action retrieves the events that are publicly accessible for the organization specified. It returns a paginated list of events with details about each event.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_ORGANIZATION_MEMBERS
nodes.name: List public organization members
nodes.description: Lists users who have publicly declared their membership in a specified, existing GitHub organization.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PUBLIC_REPOSITORIES
nodes.name: List public repositories
nodes.description: Lists all public repositories on GitHub; use the `since` parameter with a repository ID from a previous result for pagination.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PULL_REQUESTS
nodes.name: List pull requests
nodes.description: Lists pull requests for a GitHub repository. REQUIRES 'owner' AND 'repo' parameters - both are MANDATORY and must be provided in every call. Does NOT support filtering by assignee or date range - use GITHUB_FIND_PULL_REQUESTS instead for searching PRs by assignee, author, or across multiple repositories.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PULL_REQUESTS_ASSOCIATED_WITH_A_COMMIT
nodes.name: List pull requests associated with a commit
nodes.description: Lists pull requests for a commit; returns merged PRs that introduced the commit if on the default branch, or open PRs including the commit if on other branches.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_PULL_REQUESTS_FILES
nodes.name: List pull requests files
nodes.description: Lists all files (including additions, modifications, and removals) associated with a specific pull request in a GitHub repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_A_COMMIT_COMMENT
nodes.name: List reactions for a commit comment
nodes.description: Lists reactions for a specific commit comment; this is a read-only operation.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_AN_ISSUE
nodes.name: List reactions for an issue
nodes.description: Lists reactions for a specific, existing issue within an accessible GitHub repository, optionally filtering by content type.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_AN_ISSUE_COMMENT
nodes.name: List reactions for an issue comment
nodes.description: Lists reactions for a specific issue comment in a GitHub repository, optionally filtering by content type.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_A_PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW_COMMENT
nodes.name: List reactions for a pull request review comment
nodes.description: Lists reactions for a pull request review comment in a repository, optionally filtering by reaction type.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_A_RELEASE
nodes.name: List reactions for a release
nodes.description: Lists all reactions, or optionally filters reactions by a specific content type, for a given GitHub release.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_A_TEAM_DISCUSSION
nodes.name: List reactions for a team discussion
nodes.description: Lists reactions for an existing team discussion within an organization. This endpoint allows you to retrieve all reactions (emoji responses) made to a specific team discussion. You can optionally filter by reaction type. Note: OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `read:discussion` scope to use this endpoint.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REACTIONS_FOR_A_TEAM_DISCUSSION_COMMENT
nodes.name: List reactions for a team discussion comment
nodes.description: Lists reactions for a specific comment in a team discussion within an organization, optionally filtering by content type.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_RELEASE_ASSETS
nodes.name: List release assets
nodes.description: Lists assets (e.g., compiled binaries, source code archives) for a specific GitHub release, identified by `release_id` which must be valid for an existing release in the repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_RELEASES
nodes.name: List releases
nodes.description: Retrieves a list of all releases (published, draft, and prerelease) for a specified repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_ACCESS_BY_TOKEN
nodes.name: List repo access by token
nodes.description: Lists repositories in an organization that a fine-grained personal access token has requested access to. Only GitHub Apps can use this endpoint. Requires 'Personal access token requests' organization permissions (read).

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_CODESPACES
nodes.name: List repo codespaces for authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists Codespaces the authenticated user can access within a specified, existing repository.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_DEV_CONTAINER_CONFIGS_FOR_USER
nodes.name: List repo dev container configs for user
nodes.description: Lists the `devcontainer.json` configurations available in a specified repository for use with GitHub Codespaces.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_INVITATIONS_FOR_AUTH_USER
nodes.name: List authenticated user's repository invitations
nodes.description: Lists all pending repository invitations for the authenticated user.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_NOTIFICATIONS_FOR_AUTH_USER
nodes.name: List repository notifications for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Retrieves notifications for the authenticated user from a specified repository, to which the user must have access.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPO_SECRETS_WITHOUT_VALUES
nodes.name: List repo secrets without values
nodes.description: Lists all Codespaces secrets available in a specific repository, without their encrypted values.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPOSITORIES_ACCESSIBLE_TO_THE_APP_INSTALLATION
nodes.name: List repos accessible to app installation
nodes.description: Lists repositories a GitHub App installation can access. IMPORTANT: This endpoint requires a GitHub App installation access token (ghs_* prefix) for authentication. OAuth/user access tokens (gho_*) or personal access tokens are not supported and will result in a 403 Forbidden error. Returns 'total_count' and 'repositories' array with pagination support.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPOSITORIES_FOR_A_USER
nodes.name: List repositories for a user
nodes.description: Lists public repositories for a specified GitHub user, who must have an existing account.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPOSITORIES_FOR_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER
nodes.name: List repositories for the authenticated user
nodes.description: Lists repositories for the authenticated user; using 'type' with 'visibility' or 'affiliation' API parameters (not in this model) can cause a 422 error.

nodes.label: GITHUB_LIST_REPOSITORIES_STARRED_BY_A_USER
nodes.name: List repositories starred by a user
nodes.description: Lists repositories a valid and existing GitHub user has starred.
